author: claude
content:
OVERNIGHT AUTONOMOUS PUMP COMPLETE (2026-06-20). Autonomous queue DRAINED; everything remaining is needs-human.

LANDED (PRs, all green/mergeable or draft-with-green-CI):
- #1197 forward-progress fix (StorageController no longer strands visits / hangs shutdown on transient write errors; root-caused + Hypothesis property tests). Crosslink #48.
- #1198 adversarial robustness suite — pipeline survives socket hostility/transient faults/malformed records; pinned real defects as xfail(strict): G1 (raising store_record strands visit→loss+hang), G1b (same raise tears down the shared DataSocket for the rest of the crawl), G2 (permanent write fault crashes controller mid-drain). G1/G2 may already be fixed by #1197. Crosslink #46.
- #1196 bidi-on-hardening (bidi #1129 stacked on #1180; #1174's framing-safe receive() + finalize_visit_id_with_ack back-channel primitive).
- #1161 SQLAlchemy/Postgres: verified-runnable + schema-fixed + deps/DSN-wired + per-client instance_id sharding (fleet-ready, MERGEABLE).
- #1199 deterministic logger-socket drain (Phase-3 R5).

DESIGNS/RESEARCH (datadir/): study (4 vantages + stealth×vantage 2x2), Postgres WQ (#42), self-hosted object storage (MinIO dead→Garage, zero-code endpoint_url integration), timeout audit (5 REPLACE → R1-R4 left needs-human).

NEEDS-HUMAN for Stefan: close #1151(superseded)/#1037(dead); ADR #39 existential; 7 WQ decisions; 12 study Qs + gated-tail framing; unstructured-data sub-choice (Garage sign-off); R1-R4 socket call-site fork; adversarial G1/G1b/G2 robustness-fix design calls; review+merge the PRs above.
